action.reasoning: Observation: Best macro_f1=0.3789 with fine-tuned CLIP ViT-L/14, severe overfitting (95.4% train vs 61.9% val). 1.67h remaining. Analysis: Zero-shot CLIP provides domain-invariant features by construction - ensembling fine-tuned predictions with zero-shot CLIP predictions could improve OOD generalization without retraining. Adding hflip TTA may also help. Decision: Update predict.py with zero-shot CLIP ensemble + hflip TTA, check class names to verify they're meaningful for zero-shot, submit eval with current checkpoint.
action.command: head -30 /data/class_names.txt && cp /data/class_names.txt . && python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt',map_location='cpu'); print('Args:',ckpt.get('args')); print('EMA exists:',ckpt.get('ema_state_dict') is not None); sd=ckpt.get('model_state_dict',{}); print('SD keys sample:',list(sd.keys())[:10]); print('SD total keys:',len(sd))"
